name: TenantServiceGroupRequest
description: TenantServiceGroupRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE Tenancy Service API

display_name.description: Display name for the new TSG.

description.description: Optional description of the TSG's purpose.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent TSG under which to create this TSG.

support_account_id.description: Palo Alto Networks support account ID to associate with this TSG.
